scaffold.title: The foundation is set.
scaffold.lead: Next.js, the design system (navy · charcoal · gold), typography and bilingual support (DE/EN) are in place. Next up: the homepage hero section with five visual variants to choose from.

hero.title: Legal certainty with foresight.
hero.subtitle: Personal counsel and assertive representation – for individuals and businesses in Munich and nationwide.

variants.heading: Hero section – 5 variants
variants.intro: Scroll through all five drafts and tell me the number you like best. The content is identical – only the design differs.
variants.v3Desc: Elegant dark mode with gold accents
variants.v8Desc: Claim left, numbered practice areas right

services.heading: Four focuses, one standard.
services.intro: Whether private or corporate – we represent your interests with clarity, experience and resolve.
services.d1: Dismissals, severance and termination agreements: we represent employees and employers assertively – out of court and before the labour court.
services.d2: Divorce, maintenance and custody as well as wills and estates – advised with empathy and arranged with foresight.
services.d3: Contracts, corporate law and liability: legally sound solutions for companies, founders and the self-employed.
services.d4: Defence in investigations and criminal proceedings – discreet, determined and fully focused on your case.

variantsSvc.heading: Services section – 5 variants
variantsSvc.intro: Scroll through all five drafts and tell me the number you like best.
variantsSvc.v5Desc: Section on navy with gold accents
